projectDescription: A simple benchmarking tool for evaluating small LLMs across instruction following, string manipulation, and arithmetic tasks
keyFeatures: Benchmark LLMs with four distinct evaluation tasks
Support for OpenAI-compatible APIs and LM-Studio
Reasoning model support with configurable effort levels
Detailed JSON output with timing and accuracy metrics
Interactive result analysis with statistical insights
publicApiSurface: add_two_ints() - Test integer addition with large numbers
nresponse() - Execute API call with streaming support
console class - Terminal UI for benchmark progress
reasoning_lenth_stats() - Statistical analysis of reasoning output
